title: hymenostephium tenue
intro: Hymenostephium tenue, also known as the delicate Hymenostephium, is a flowering plant species within the family Asteraceae. It is native to Mexico and Central America. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hymenostephium tenue include treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, salves, or infusions for topical application and oral consumption.
